title: Add phaseId-based secondary index maps to worker state manager
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/worker/state.ts

Read the existing file. Add secondary index maps for phaseId-based lookups:

private specsByPhase: Map<string, string> = new Map(); // phaseId -> specId
private prdsByPhase: Map<string, string> = new Map(); // phaseId -> prdId

Update createSpec to also set: this.specsByPhase.set(spec.phaseId, spec.id)
Update deleteSpec to also clear: this.specsByPhase.delete(existing.phaseId)
Update getSpecByPhase to use: const specId = this.specsByPhase.get(phaseId); return specId ? this.specs.get(specId) || null : null;

Same pattern for PRD indexes.

Update hydrate() to rebuild indexes after loading data.
